## Description

Brief summary of what this PR changes and why.

## Related Story

- Story ID: `S0.1` *(replace with actual story ID from the delivery plan)*
- GitHub Issue: #

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `style` — CSS/template change (no logic)
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `docs` — README or documentation
- [ ] `chore` — Config, dependencies, deployment
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructure, no behaviour change

## Testing

- [ ] `python manage.py check` passes with no errors
- [ ] Manual test performed: *(describe what you clicked/tested)*
- [ ] If a form was changed: tested with invalid inputs
- [ ] If a view was changed: tested with correct and incorrect roles
- [ ] If a template was changed: W3C HTML validation passes

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, passwords, or API keys in any committed file
- [ ] All new functions have docstrings
- [ ] Code follows PEP 8 conventions
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits format (`feat(app): description`)
- [ ] README updated if this PR adds a new feature or changes deployment steps
- [ ] Story moved to ✅ Done on GitHub Projects board
